title: Eurycaulis cymboglossus

The classification of this plant is within the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, it belongs to the class Magnoliopsida. Eurycaulis cymboglossus is further classified into the order Malpighiales, and within this order, it is a member of the family Euphorbiaceae. This classification provides a detailed understanding of the plant's evolutionary history and its position among other plant species.
